entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors Certifications for Certified Individuals in SAP HCM (C_THR12) Available

entry.title: S4 Integration with OTM
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking for a basic information on how can I integrate S4 with OTM (Oracle Transportation Management).

Do I need to enable basic TM on S4 side to work with OTM or do I need anything else?

Regards,

Aakash

entry.title: Re: Request in SAP
entry.content: Hello, Can you please add more context to your question. For example what object, characteristics (including dates), key figures are involved?

entry.title: Group Reporting and Preperation Ledger
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a few questions regarding the Group Reporting and the Preperation ledger. 

 

we would like to release the data for our ConsUnits from FI beginning from 2024.09.

As we cannot realign data for closed periods by our internal directive, the preparation ledger cannot be used – at least not for the initial loads into Group Reporting (since it would post into ACDOCA – FI is used already for over 20 years).

 

The prep ledger integration is set to 1001 currently and cannot be changed without SAP support. This is why we would like to know how to best deal with our situation.

 

I have following questions:

  • Can the preparation ledger integration be changed/deactivated and the ordinary data release be used instead without expected issues?
  • Would it also be an option to activate the ledger beginning from 2025 and use the ordinary data release only for the 2024 loads into Group Reporting?
  • What is the best practice in such cases?
  • Who needs to do those changes?

 

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Schedule OverView (Capacity Planning) Reddening, even though there is no overlap

Hi.

Reddening, even though there is no overlap

Why is this?

What are the possible causes?

please tell me…

entry.title: SAP Ariba integration with SAGE ERP (Third Party)
entry.content:
Dear Experts

We have received client's requirement to integrate SAGE X3 ERP with SAP Ariba sourcing suite, but client is not having SAP integration suite as a part of scope.

In this case how can we integrate 

  • Product Master (Sage X3 ERP to SAP Ariba)
  • Supplier Master (SAP Ariba to Sage X3 ERP)
  • PR (Sage X3 ERP to SAP Ariba)
  • PO (SAP Ariba to Sage X3 ERP)

Requesting your guidance and support us with any documentation or material available to proceed.

Thank you

Regards

Prathamesh

entry.title: FAGLL03H- Material G/L - Material group column not showing in G/L line Item #fagll03h
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I went through the FAGLL03H t-code and chose a Packing material consumption G./L. I want to add the column called ''Material Group"' in layout options. previous times the Material Group was shown in the column. But, now it doesn't appear in the line item. Please advice the reason for this type of errors and how to make this correct.

entry.title: DB13 Backup issue
entry.content:
hi

I am a beginner. I installed an SAP server ECC 6.0 and want to take a backup via DB13, but I have received errors. kindly provide proper solution.

14.01.2025 12:17:33 Job started
14.01.2025 12:17:33 Step 001 started (program RSDBAJOB, variant &0000000000320, user ID AJAMIL)
14.01.2025 12:17:33 Execute logical command BRBACKUP On host ADCPRD
14.01.2025 12:17:33 Parameters:-u / -jid FLL__20250114121733 -c force -t online -m full -p initprd.sap
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0051I BRBACKUP 7.20 (36)
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0055I Start of database backup: bfqesuob.fnd 2025-01-14 12.17.33
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0484I BRBACKUP log file: G:\oracle\PRD\sapbackup\bfqesuob.fnd
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0280I BRBACKUP time stamp: 2025-01-14 12.17.33
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0301E SQL error -1017 at location BrDbConnect-2, SQL statement:
14.01.2025 12:17:33 'CONNECT /'
14.01.2025 12:17:33 ORA-01017: invalid username/password; logon denied
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0310E Connect to database instance PRD failed
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0280I BRBACKUP time stamp: 2025-01-14 12.17.33
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0301E SQL error -1017 at location BrDbConnect-2, SQL statement:
14.01.2025 12:17:33 'CONNECT /'
14.01.2025 12:17:33 ORA-01017: invalid username/password; logon denied
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0310E Connect to database instance PRD failed
14.01.2025 12:17:33
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0056I End of database backup: bfqesuob.fnd 2025-01-14 12.17.33
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0280I BRBACKUP time stamp: 2025-01-14 12.17.33
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0054I BRBACKUP terminated with errors
14.01.2025 12:17:33 External program terminated with exit code 3
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BRBACKUP returned error status E
14.01.2025 12:17:33 Job finished

entry.title: Re: Difference between first bin location and default bin...
entry.content:
Hi,

default Bin-Location means, every time SAP needs a bin location (e.g. GRPO) the system would choose it first.

First Bin-Location is set by the system and is the first bin (sorting by name) which contains the item.

regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hello @ThomasK,

new time line is mentioned in the blog above:

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Extend suppliers with a different number as BP via DMC
entry.content:
Dear All,
I have a situation, where I have Employee vendors in my system. Now I need to extend (via Data migration cockpit) these but the BP number and the relevant vendor number should be different. How this can be achieved?

entry.title: Re: Make keyfigure show no value
entry.content:
Hi Jens,

I do not think that is possible. Showing "nothing" / "empty" in a report is always "a bit of a thing", and some how 0 is a way of presenting a type of "nothing".

What i did in a situation where we had to visualize values and 0 / no values in reports, i added exceptions (via the manage data option in the report, and use some color for example for the values > 1 which takes of the attention a bit of the zeros.

MJ

entry.title: Re: Account Code and Name Query with Parent and Child in same Row
entry.content: Hi Rah, could you please add a screenshot showing a part of your Chart of Accounts, that shows the structure? Just to visualize what your expected result is based on. Regards, Johan

Hi @chris_SAP ,

Not required , in communication system just upload the certificate name ( pk_e3........) like this you have right.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 HANA memory issue
entry.content:
Hi Anand Ramachandran,

Issue description: "...the root cause as HANA memory is low..."
"However after restart of services it resumes to function as normal & we will not face any issue for a month(approx) again same happens,"

Issue:
Memory problem that (regularly) occurs after restarting the service, approx. after a month. So SAP HANA uses more and more memory over time until reach the limit.

I recommend you the following documents to analyze the issue:

  1. Collected information about memory in context of SAP HANA
  2. SAP GUI - Transaction Code - DBACOCKPIT (Load History) 
  3. 3284834 - SQL Statement Collection: "HANA_Configuration_Minichecks" report for SAP HANA
  4. 3456746 - SQL Statement Collection: "HANA_Memory_OutOfMemoryEvents" report for SAP HANA
  5. 3330262 - SQL Statement Collection: "HANA_Memory_Overview" report for SAP HANA

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: Re: 🎉 Exciting News: I’m SAP Certified! 🎉
entry.content: Congratulations.

entry.title: SAC: combining data in dataset, model from files.
entry.content:
Hello,

new to SAC, i use trial version. I have problem when loading csv. files to the model. It's a classical example of database tables, where you have multiple tables joined by keys. 

What i want to achieve:
my example data consist basically from two master data tables airporst.csv, airlines.csv, which describe specific details for each airline or airport,  and one transaction data (also csv) flights.csv. I want to joint these three tables into one in modeller.
Flights.csv have a int foreign key airport_id and airlines_id that can be joined to airport.csv and airlines.csv tables.
It's very easy to join these three tables into one result table with sql, pandas, powerBi but impossible task in SAC. Why ? How do you combine data in modeler ? 

I saw 3 years old yt tutorial video  which shows button for merging data. However, in new SAC version this button is missing. Is this problem with trial version or general SAC problem ? 

Thank you all for aswers,

Victor

entry.title: Re: Custom Enhancement Tab in SAP GUI
entry.content:
Hello Gunadharshini,

To make the necessary adjustments in SAP On-Premise, please go to transaction SIMG and follow this path:

Project System -> Structures -> Operative Structures -> Network -> Enhancements for Networks -> Develop Customer-Specific Fields in Network Header.

Take a look at the documentation. You need to set up the enhancement CNEX0016 as described in the documentation.

Let me know if it works.

Best regards,

Tobias

entry.title: Warehouse cannot always be changed in A/R Credit Memo
entry.content:
Hi,

When you copy a Sales Return to a A/R Credit Memo, the warehouse is not editable in the A/R Credit Memo. The column appears blocked, while it is active in the forum settings.

When you copy an A/R Invoice to a Credit Memo, you can change te warehouse in the A/R Credit Memo.

Why is there a difference and can this be changed somewhere in the settings?

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG feature File Download and File Upload.
entry.content:
Hi Shweta,

Your understanding is correct!

The most convenient way to create materials/bp in load is using consolidation processes. In case you do not want consolidation, you can also try for Data import framework.  These options will take less time and efforts compared to file uploads.

entry.title: Re: How to configure the Change record and capture the changes done in master data
entry.content: Hi, have you implemented the changes with a Change Master connected to the Change Record? Also - have you checked the scope of the configuration of your impact analysis? Thanks much, Ulf.

entry.title: Custom PP report is generating in Quality System but not in Production system.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Recent PP support team created one custom report in Z transaction. This report is about pp packing list. When we give input from notepad ( Header level material and its requirement )

System create packing list in z transaction which contains required BOM component quantity.

My query is, it is working perfectly fine in quality system for all materials but it is not working in production system for some materials. What could be the problem ?  Do I need to check missing table entries in production ?

Can you please help me wit inputs

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG feature File Download and File Upload.
entry.content:
Hi Shweta,

Your understanding is correct!

The most convenient way to create materials/bp in load is using consolidation processes. In case you do not want consolidation, you can also try for Data import framework.  These options will take less time and efforts compared to file uploads.

entry.title: Re: Custom PP report is generating in Quality System but not in Production system.
entry.content: It's a custom Z-report, specific to your implementation. No one here can help you, unfortunately. We don't know your report.

entry.title: Introducing ‘AI-assisted declaration image analysis’ in SAP Green Token
entry.content:
Declaration management is often one of the most inefficient, error-prone, and time-consuming aspects of supply chain sustainability compliance. But what if that could soon be a thing of the past? 🕚

Say hello to SAP Green Token’s ‘AI-assisted declaration image analysis’ feature: a game-changing capability designed to automatically search, validate, and extract information from supplier sustainability declarations.

Gone are the days of manual data entries or sifting through countless documents. Now, your data will be seamlessly embedded in Green Token, enabling enhanced traceability and compliance with sustainability standards and regulations. 💻

Figure 1: preview - extracted data from an ISCC PLUS declaration.

How it works

It’s simple. As shown in Figure 1, when supplier sustainability declarations are received as part of the ‘Inbounds’ process in Green Token, the declarations are automatically validated, and relevant data is extracted. This information is added to the corresponding inbound delivery line items, ready for further use in subsequent Green Token processes. As a user, you’ll primary see the results, with the process running autonomously in the background.

Figure 2: example of an ISCC PLUS supplier declaration (version 3.5.4).

A practical example

Figure 2 presents an example of an ISCC PLUS declaration. ISCC PLUS-certified organizations manage hundreds if not thousands of these supplier declarations each year when procuring certified sustainable materials. Extracting data from each declaration is required for tracing and accounting for the sustainability attributes of inbound materials, and once processed, the outbound materials.

Traditionally, most companies handle this manually via Excel, often requiring dedicated full-time employees. However, as volumes of certified sustainable materials grow, so does the need for an efficient, automated, and reliable solution.

Green Token’s ‘AI-assisted declaration image analysis’ feature automatically validates the highlighted data in Figure 2 to check for completeness and accuracy by, for example, identifying missing or incorrect information. 🔍 Subsequently, the relevant data is extracted from the supplier declarations and recorded as part of the corresponding inbound delivery line items.

Release Details

The beta version of the ‘AI-assisted declaration image analysis’ feature is launched in January 2025 for a select group of customers. Developed with SAP AI Core service on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) and powered by the GPT-4o learning model, the feature is set for general release in H1 2025. This initial release will support ISCC PLUS declaration templates (versions 3.5.3 and 3.5.4) in PDF format, ensuring continuous compliance with evolving industry standards. ⚖️ Additional use-cases and enhancements will be considered to further expand the feature’s capabilities.

Unlocking the Benefits

Figure 3: business case details

The business case is clear. 👀

  • Process large volumes of supplier declarations quickly and with ease. ⏳
  • Minimize errors, save time, and free up valuable resources. 💰
  • Eliminate the need to build or purchase costly data extraction tools. 🏗
  • Simplify declaration searches and reviews. 👨‍🏫

Green Token ensures your supply chain sustainability material information is complete, traceable, and audit-proof, allowing you focus on what really matters – managing high-risk suppliers and critical materials. ✔️

Get Ready, Stay Compliant

Whether you’re preparing for compliance or scaling your sustainable materials portfolio, why wait for deadlines or operational bottlenecks? By adopting AI-powered declaration management today, you’ll minimize risk, streamline processes, and stay ahead of the competition.

🔎  Curious to learn more? Request a demo or reach out directly.

👀  We love to hear from you! Let us know your thoughts in the comments.

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

Hi! 👋 I’m Gloria Figaroa. Since 2015, I live and breathe sustainability and supply chain management. 🍃 I’ve had the pleasure to work on Green Token for the past 4+ years as a Product Manager. Now in my latest role as Product Marketing Manager, I take care of everything Go-to-Market. 🌍

Follow me to stay up to date on the SAP Green Token solution, its newest features and functions, and detailed overviews of its capabilities. You will hear it first here! 📢

entry.title: Re: SAC: combining data in dataset, model from files.
entry.content:
Hi @Vikinos, 

This feature is available in classic (old) model. 

In new model it will be available (according to roadmap) in Q2 2025

entry.title: Re: Receiving E-Invoices with SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
The creator of the post does not answer my question so I will share my observations.

This solution has many bugs:
The UBL standard used already has new versions which are not included in this solution.
In order to add an invoice correctly, there must be a supplier ID and a buyer ID on the invoice from our system. I would just like to point out that in Europe, the ID that everyone knows is the VAT number. It is not used here.
The same problem applies to the lines on the invoice, they are not added if the ID from our system is not there.
These are purely technical issues that we can work around with our own effort. Unfortunately for the person adding the invoice (e.g. the accountant), there is no preview of the invoice, so there is nothing to compare it with if the data is correct. He can, of course, open the xml file and read the bushes.

What about when the supplier does not exist in our system? We have to go to the footer of the e-mail and look for data about it on the Internet.

Another disadvantage is that an invoice is immediately created in the system and if it is wrong or something is wrong, we have to set it as cancelled. This results in a loss of numbering continuity, which is something accountants don't like.

We are left with the question of how this can be resolved. Using different tools, do you spend your time converting from different standards to a standard acceptable to SAP or is there another way out.

The answer is yes there is another way out and all in all with little and relatively free effort.

I have personally created a converter from XML to PDF. I use Power Automate for this (if a company uses MS Office, it can make such a converter for free - the cost is only the time of an employee who prepares it). I copy an email with XML to the appropriate folder, it starts my process and after a while an email with a PDF arrives in my mailbox. OCR works well in SAP and the accountant, after uploading the file, sees everything and can make corrections. He can add a supplier etc....


It's more fun to add an invoice using OData, and here again the developers have not shown off. But that is a subject for another story.

I would just like to add that when I started asking about the technical side of Support SAP, they pointed me to this blog and asked me to ask here because I would definitely get an answer.

Unfortunately, I was left without support, without good documentation and without answers. I managed, but is that the point.

Regards

Jacek

entry.title: Re: SAC: combining data in dataset, model from files.
entry.content: Thank you, got it. Maybe for others to quickly find old mode => create_model.

entry.title: Re: Credit note automatically deducted from invoice balance
entry.content:
Hi,

Credit Memo based on the Invoice creates and direct relation between the documents and a system reconciliation. The credit memo reduces the amount of due for the invoice.

If you create it based on the Invoice, then you will only have the Invoice open balance i.e Invoice Balance -Credit memo Balance to be made available in Payment window.

If you do not want to reduce the Invoice Balance Due, then you can create a standalone Credit Memo (not basing it on Invoice) and then use the Internal Reconciliation to reconcile manually whatever invoice, payment and credit memo value you want to reconcile.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: How to expose on-premise SAP B1 service layer with si...
entry.content: it's a public IP, however you need to work with the customer's IT administrator to have a fixed public IP address for your server.

entry.title: Re: Warehouse cannot always be changed in A/R Credit Memo
entry.content:
Hi,

I checked by creating a Sales Return to Whse 01 and then based on it created a AR Credit memo to look whether the Whse can be changed or not. When I clicked on the Whse field it displayed a message "You cannot enter warehouse code different from code in base document".

This was tested in FP2411.

The sales return has already booked the qty returned in a specific warehouse and now the AR Credit memo creation will be in relevance to the Whse where already the goods returned are received.

whereas

In case of AR Invoice with Whse 01 and AR Credit Memo with different Whse, the sold goods are sent from a warehouse and with credit memo is received in another one as required.

kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Passing parameters causes a corrupt query
entry.content:
If I do open and refresh a web document, it works perfectly.
If I schedule the same document with the same parameters, I get the error "ORA-24373: statement handle not prepared".

jobserver_SVPRBOB01.AdaptiveJobServer_WebIJavaSchedulingService_CHILD0_trace.000001.glf:

"|8E950D31880A4C57B514DEB1807709C10|2025 01 16 10:04:05.424|+0100|Error| |>=|E| |jobserver_SVPRBOB01.AdaptiveJobServer_WebIJavaSchedulingService_CHILD0| 6380| 36|ORBacus:ThreadPerRequest:Dispatcher| |3348|0|4|0|BIlaunchpad.WebApp|SVPRBOB01:3260:21.979:1|CMS.runJobs|localhost:7128:1764.228810:1|.run|SVPRBOB01:6380:36.7:1|CihllA4vqEyXk8RzgwzDRjM367|||||||||com.businessobjects.rebean.wi.toolbox.impl.services.VisualizationConfigurationServiceImpl||input contained no data
|8E950D31880A4C57B514DEB1807709C11|2025 01 16 10:04:07.000|+0100|Error| |>>|E| |jobserver_SVPRBOB01.AdaptiveJobServer_WebIJavaSchedulingService_CHILD0| 6380| 36|ORBacus:ThreadPerRequest:Dispatcher| |3382|0|4|0|BIlaunchpad.WebApp|SVPRBOB01:3260:21.979:1|CMS.runJobs|localhost:7128:1764.228810:1|.run|SVPRBOB01:6380:36.7:1|CihllA4vqEyXk8RzgwzDRjM367|||||||||||Prompt mismatch for instance of Id:"1721500" and name:"3) Leistungserbringermerkmale (=> Daten für Grafik in Excel)". The prompts whose ID are "[(ZSR Nummern 1:,[DP0]), (ZSR Nummern 2:,[DP0]), (ZSR Nummern 3:,[DP0]), (ZSR Nummern 4:,[DP0]), (ZSR Nummern 5:,[DP0]), (ZSR Nummern 6:,[DP0]), (ZSR Nummern 7:,[DP0]), (ZSR Nummern 8:,[DP0]), (ZSR Nummern 9:,[DP0]), (ZSR Nummern 10:,[DP0]), (Leistungserbringerkanton(e):,[DP0]), (ZSR Nummer(n) Leistungsveranlasser:,[DP0]), (Kanton(e) Versicherter:,[DP0]), (Kostenart(en):,[DP0]), (Behandlungsbeginn von:,[DP0]), (Behandlungsbeginn bis:,[DP0]), (Behandlungsende von:,[DP0]), (Behandlungsende bis:,[DP0]), (Rechnungsdatum von:,[DP0]), (Rechnungsdatum bis:,[DP0]), (Abgerechnet von:,[DP0]), (Abgerechnet bis:,[DP0]), (ZSR des zu untersuchenden LERBS,[DP3])]" may have been changed since it can not be found in the list of document prompts.

Please re-create the schedule of the document to take into consideration its latest ID""

Of course i tried to do this, but with the same error


I suspect that the parameters are not being passed correctly and an invalid query is being created.
- If I copy the query from the web document and send it directly to the database, it works perfectly.
- Version: BO 4.3 Support Pack 3 Patch 3

Are there any ideas what I can do? The problem also affects reports that worked at an earlier point in time.

Best regards, Arno

entry.title: Re: Automation Pilot URL '****' is malformed
entry.content:
Hello Rouven,

Thanks for reaching out!
This error most probably indicates a problem with the service key you are using. Cloud you double check the requirements section and confirm you are indeed using a service key from the Service Manager with plan "subaccount-admin"?

Let us know if that suggestion solves your problem.

Kind regards,
Kostadin

entry.title: Unable to share flavor of UI adaptation in S/4HANA Public Cloud system.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are experiencing an issue with sharing a flavor in the UI adaptation function in our SAP public Cloud system.

When we try to release the flavor, we are asked to select an assignment category but we are unable to find any.

 

Could you help us with resolving this issue?

 

Best Regards,

Fujita

\

entry.title: Is there bulk Create, bulk Copying of BOM? in SAP S/4hana Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi

 

None of the above.

Do I have to register and copy each one?

Can't we have more than one?

entry.title: BIPST 2.x - SSL Support for Tomcat
entry.content:
I've installed BIPST 2.x latest version and followed the configuration guide for setup.

For Tomcat / Web Application Server it says we should enter the "hostname" and "HTTP port".

Due to security restrictions our BI Platform has the HTTP Port e.g. 8080 only configured for local access (IP: 127.0.0.1). All BI Services can be only accessed via HTTPS (e.g. Port 8443) from remote.

If i enter the HTTPS port as HTTP-Port then it says it cannot connect to the Tomcat (Web Application Server) for analysis.

We currently have no HostAgent and JMX configured on the BI Platform!

How can i configure Tomcat / Web Application Server in BIPST with SSL?

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP Build: Create Business Apps, Processes and website without Code(Chennai, India)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event will give you a hands-on experience of SAP Build (Low Code/No Code) solutions on SAP BTP like SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Work Zone for building Apps, business processes and business website without coding. 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • A business website (SAP Build Work Zone).

You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build artifacts, and get a deeper understanding of the following topics:

 

  • SAP Build Apps
    • Connecting to a backend service
    • Building UIs
    • Binding data
    • Navigation
    • Triggering processes from your app
    • Deploy App to BTP

 

  • SAP Build Process Automation
    • Creating a process
    • Adding approvals
    • Creating actions
    • Calling SAP backends (SAP S/4HANA Cloud and CAP services)
    • Updating data
    • Conditions and GoTo flows
    • Custom variables

 

  • SAP Build Work Zone(Standard Edition)
    • Create site
    • Create page
    • Create space
    • Embed a Build App

Location

Innov8 | Coworking Space in SKCL Techsquare,

Lazer St, South Phase, SIDCO Industrial Estate, Guindy, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600032

 

  • This is an in-person event only (not virtual)
  • Thank you to Mark9 for hosting SAP CodeJam

Date

Friday, February 7th, 2025, from 9:00 to 16:00 IST

  • A light lunch will be served.

Language of Instruction: English

The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates @Rekha_DR  and @eshrinivasan 

Please note that spaces are limited to 30. 

  • If you would like to attend, Register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section.

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • Complete these SAP Build prerequisites BEFORE you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam

entry.title: How to Import /BIC/* tables"s data between P and Q for BW systems
entry.content: How to transfer /BIC/* tables"s data between P and Q in BW systems

entry.title: Re: Class to Create Material data - CL_MASS_SAVE_MAT_PARA...
entry.content:
Hi raymond_giuseppi,

I have tried your suggestion which is to maintain the custom fields using the parameters EXTENSIONIN and EXTENSIONINX. But the problem is with these parameters it allows me to maintain the structures BAPI_TE_MARA or BAPI_TE_MARC such as. But in my case our customized fields are appended using a custom structure (ZMAT_IDEN). 

So is there another way which I can maintain those fields?

entry.title: Re: Dates and Roundings in Compensation
entry.content:
Hello @xavierlegarrec ,

The consultant Phil is referring to is me, I can confirm that this is indeed working and I want to thank you and the other contributors to the compensation community. It really enables and inspires us consultants to come up with clever solutions to clients requirements.

I have been told it's important to give Kudos, which is something I will start to do from now on.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Git: /bin/bash: warning: setlocale: LC_ALL: cannot change locale (en_US.UTF-8)
entry.content: Having the same problem, please help if anyone knows a workaround.

entry.title: Re: Windows Username automatically populating sapshcut.exe
entry.content:
Hi,

Get the same issue unfortunately, windows username is still populating the SAP Logon box.

entry.title: Re: Negative sign at end of the Value in Adobe Forms
entry.content:
Hi, fallowing solution worked for me, i want to keep pattern also.

// data before: -281.827,80

if (this.rawValue[0] === '-') {
// Remove the minus sign
this.rawValue = this.rawValue.substring(1);
}

// data after
281.827,80

entry.title: Re: Class to Create Material data - CL_MASS_SAVE_MAT_PARA...
entry.content: Use the already suggested BAdI (pass your Z structure name and data in EXTENSIONIN and handle it in the BAdI implementation)

entry.title: Re: Updating a Content Package in error in SAP Workzone Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hi Luciano
I used the workaround indicated in my question.

entry.title: Generate ABAP Repository objects not display after install
entry.content:
I installed the RAP Generator according to the GitHub guide:
https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-abap-rap?tab=readme-ov-file
I used ZABAPGIT_STANDALONE and a ZIP file for the installation.
The service binding ZDMO_UI_RAPG_PROJECT_O2 was not available, so I created it and published it:

When I right-click on the project or table, the option of "Generate ABAP Repository Objects does not appear":

However, it does appear for the project connected to ABAP ENV in BTP.
My system is S/4Hana 2021 on RISE, and these are the versions of Hana studio:

Any idea?


Thanks and Regards,

Danielle

entry.title: Re: AL11 directory file to DMS Data upload
entry.content:
We need to use only the API service not BAPI_CREATE_DOCUMENT2 to avoid files were being saved but with 0 kbs.

Thank you

Raghav

entry.title: BOM changes are not uploaded in SAP through Windchill software
entry.content:
Hi Sir/Mam ,

Our client is creating and changing master data in Windchill software. But when we create new BOM in Windchill software it is successfully transferred in SAP via PI/PO server but when any Changes in BOM is done in Windchill then these changes are not fetched in SAP. SAP system is giving the response that  

The group data for the material xxxx is locked by PS4_POUSER

It is happening randomly , some time BOM changes are updated successfully . Need your assist.

entry.title: Re: SAC: combining data in dataset, model from files.
entry.content:
Hi @Vikinos,

Import Your CSV Files
You need to import each of your CSV files (airports, airlines, and flights) into SAC separately as individual data sources.

Go to the Modeler in SAC.
Choose Create a New Model.
Import your CSV files one by one (you will need to create separate data sources for each)

Create one dimension Namely Data source and Add Member as Airport Airline Flight 

While uploading the data Mapping properly as per data source 

For example if you are import airport CSV you need to Mapp default Data source as Airport. 

Kindly upvote if you find it helpful!

Thanks.

entry.title: files were being saved but with 0 kbs using BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2 FROM AL11
entry.content:
HI Experts,

I am using BAPI BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2 for upload PDF document from AL11 into DMS.  file is created but files were being saved but with 0 kbs. is any parameter we need to pass in FM to avoid this issue , Please confirm.

Thank you

Raghav

entry.title: Update the Product Description in the BOM from item master data
entry.content:
Hi,

Update the Product Description in the BOM from item master, refer the attached print screen, does this apply to BOM item rows?

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Resolve High Impact Performance Issues
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m working with Widgets in a story that are taking a long time to load. Using the Performance Analysis Tools in SAC, I identified a few possible reasons for the weak performance. Take a look at the screenshot below.

 

  1. Number of Dimension Attributes: 92
    We have dimensions with attributes, but they’re not being used in the Widget. Could these still affect performance?

  2. Number of User-Defined Variable Exits: 8
    This makes sense—more prompted variables likely increase processing time.

  3. Number of Elements in Structure 1: 50
    I’m not entirely sure what this refers to. Does it count all the dimensions and measures in the query?

  4. Number of Free Dimensions: 17
    What exactly does this refer to? Is it query-related?

I’d appreciate your insights on these four points.

Thanks in advance!

Ismail

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @jw33 ,
I've exactly the same issue in the docker log. I'm on win 11 pro WS edition (24H2, Build: 26100.2894 ) and updated to Docker Desktop 4.37.1 (178610).
No ARM here, but it was working few weeks ago on the same machine.
WSL version: 2.3.26.0
Kernel version: 5.15.167.4-1
BR, Attila

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Hana DB: Feature not supported on this instance
entry.content: I have tested it and it worked for me too

entry.title: Re: BOM changes are not uploaded in SAP through Windchill...
entry.content:
Hi @Shree78 

This issue occurs when another process or user session (most likely from the PP/PI/PO interface) is actively working on or has locked the material group data.

If someone else is also working on the same BOM, this error will appear.

To resolve the issue, simply ask the user to close their session, and the problem should be resolved.

If you found this helpful, kindly upvote.

Thank you!

entry.title: MARC | MVKE tables not getting updated with MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to use the BAPI 'MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK' to create material data. Currently I am stuck on how to update fields in MARC table and MVKE tables where we maintain plant related data and sales organization data. Material is getting created but other tables are not getting updated except MAKT table. Can anyone help me on why those tables are not getting updated with this BAPI? 

Below is the parameters which I have passed.

entry.title: Re: How to Read Data Stored in SAP Datasphere from SAP BW Bridge
entry.content:
@beolion Target and mapping must be done in the custom ABAP code.

        DATA(l_r_writer) = cl_rs_bw_data_api_factory=>get_datastore_data_handler( 'MY_ADSO' ).

In this snippet, the name of the target ADSO is MY_ADSO.

entry.title: Re: FAGLL03H- Material G/L - Material group column not showing in G/L line Item #fagll03h
entry.content: Have you already checked the "field status group" of this general account? Is it the same (or not) as that of the previous account in which the field is shown?

entry.title: Re: DataAction (Calculation in data action for inflation...
entry.content:
Hi @William_Yu,

Is it possible to create a Data Action in SAP Analytics Cloud that retrieves data from multiple models? If yes, could you please explain how to achieve this?

Thanks in advance,

Ganjos

entry.title: Re: Fiori app BankAccount-maintainHierarchy just Bank Hierarchy view visible
entry.content: Hi Iker, Have you found the solution to your problem?Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: BOM changes are not uploaded in SAP through Windchill...
entry.content: OK Sir , Can we check it in SM12 transaction ? It is communication user who uses PI/PO server to transfer BOM. System is showing that communication user is locking group data for the material.

entry.title: Re: SAC - Previous years calculation for account dimension
entry.content:
Thank you William,

I tried your suggest and it worked.

The only thing I ask you is if it's possible to change dinamically the labels of the lines, as you see actually the names I set are RunEBT-2 and RunEBT-1, and so due that the year chosen below is 2025, it means that the blue line refers to 2023 and the orange refers to 2024.

Due that the starting year is dynamic (chosed by a story filter), it should be better instead that the labels should be renamed dinamically, that is if I choose year = 2025, I'd like to see "RunEBT 2023" for blue line and "RunEBT 2024" for orange line.

Is it possible in any way?

Thank you for your reply

entry.title: Double-Check Your Serial Numbers with the new BAdI: Serial Number Check
entry.content:
Introduction

When business is moving fast in your production line, it can easily happen that a serial number is entered incorrectly. The new Business Add-In (BadI), Serial Number Check, can help ensure that serial numbers are entered correctly. It checks serial numbers upon entry and sends custom error messages when the entry is incorrect.

Prerequisites

Roles and Authorizations:

  • For the Custom Logic app: A business expert or implementation consultant role is required.
  • For the Manage Stock app: The Inventory Manager or Warehouse Clerk role is required.

Example Implementation

With this example implementation, we will show you how to implement the Serial Number Check BAdI using the Custom Logic app.

Start by opening the Custom Logic app and clicking on Create in the table toolbar.

From the Business Context drop-down, choose Equipment.

Choose the Serial Number Check extension point and then click on Step 2.

Give your implementation a name in the Implementation Description field. For this example, I have named it TEST_BLOG. The Implementation ID field will be filled automatically.

Click Review to see the details of your newly created implementation. Then, to create your implementation click Create.

Now that your BAdI implementation is created, it is time to edit the implementation. Choose Publish to get started.

After processing, the status of your implementation will change to Published. You can now click the Open Code Editor.

In the code editing screen, you can now see a space to edit your code and another space for the parameters that are available for the BAdI. In the space for editing, you can choose to edit your implementation directly or, in this case, I will copy the sample code. To do this, I click on Show Sample Code. 

A pop-up appears. Choose Copy to Clipboard.

After you copy the sample code, choose the Edit button, and paste the sample code into the editor. You will have to “prettify” the code by deleting the comments and stars.

From here, you can adapt the code to fit your needs. In this example, I adapted the code to specify that every serial number should start with HAMWHE as the first 6 characters. I also deleted one of the conditions and adapted the error message. See the highlights below.

Save and Publish.

To test the BAdI implementation, I can try to post a material in the Manage Stock app and assign the serial number ‘12345’.

I can see that the implementation was successful when my custom error message appears telling me that the serial number must begin with ‘HAMWHE’.

I hope this blog helps you to create your own custom check BAdI implementation! If you liked it, please comment below!

For more details, see Custom Logic and Extensibility for Checking Serial Numbers.

entry.title: inscrease length of <cbc:ID></cbc:ID> in XML Data that SAP create and send for the customer
entry.content:
Hello everone, 

I would like to increase the length of the <cbc:ID> element in the XML data that SAP generates and sends via the Mail Center. Currently, it is limited to 16 characters (e.g., <cbc:ID>02011102#00004#0</cbc:ID>), but I would like to extend it to 25 characters. Additionally, the updated value should also be printed in the PDF version. How can I achieve this? Specifically, I would like to adjust the length defined for this element, and I believe the issue may be related to line 20.

 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

-<ubl:Invoice xsi:schemaLocation="urn:oasis:names:specification:ubl:schema:xsd:Invoice-2 http://docs.oasis-open.org/ubl/os-UBL-2.1/xsd/maindoc/UBL-Invoice-2.2.xsd" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:cbc="urn:oasis:names:specification:ubl:schema:xsd:CommonBasicComponents-2" xmlns:cac="urn:oasis:names:specification:ubl:schema:xsd:CommonAggregateComponents-2" xmlns:ubl="urn:oasis:names:specification:ubl:schema:xsd:Invoice-2">

<cbc:CustomizationID>urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:standard:xrechnung_2.2#conformant#urn:xoev-de:kosit:extension:xrechnung_2.2</cbc:CustomizationID>

<cbc:ID>0090363092</cbc:ID>

<cbc:IssueDate>2024-12-12</cbc:IssueDate>

<cbc:InvoiceTypeCode>380</cbc:InvoiceTypeCode>

<cbc:DocumentCurrencyCode>EUR</cbc:DocumentCurrencyCode>

<cbc:BuyerReference>991-04-53</cbc:BuyerReference>


-<cac:OrderReference>

<cbc:ID>02011102#00004#0</cbc:ID>

</cac:OrderReference>


-<cac:AccountingSupplierParty>


-<cac:Party>


-<cac:PostalAddress>

<cbc:StreetName>Gesundhei</cbc:StreetName>

<cbc:CityName>Bom</cbc:CityName>

<cbc:PostalZone>401</cbc:PostalZone>


-<cac:Country>

<cbc:IdentificationCode></cbc:IdentificationCode>

</cac:Country>

</cac:PostalAddress>


-<cac:PartyTaxScheme>

<cbc:CompanyID>DE814837991</cbc:CompanyID>


-<cac:TaxScheme>

<cbc:ID>VAT</cbc:ID>

</cac:TaxScheme>

</cac:PartyTaxScheme>


-<cac:PartyLegalEntity>

<cbc:RegistrationName>think about IT GmbH</cbc:RegistrationName>

<cbc:CompanyID></cbc:CompanyID>

<cbc:CompanyLegalForm>Think about IT GmbH ·Süd 19 · 44801 : +436721-0 · E-Mail: info@thiut.it · Web: www.think-abot.itGeschäftsführer: Dipl. jur.s, Dipl Sascha KurthS aft: Bochum · Handelsregister: AG Bochum B 11208USt.-Id4837991 · St.-Nr1605 National-Bank · IBAN:DE43 3602 0030 0009 3325 10 · BIC: NBAGDE3EXXXVoBa Sprockhövel · IBompanyLealForm>

</cac:PartyLegalEntity>


-<cac:Contact>

<cbc:Name>Veneno</cbc:Name>
<cbc:Telephone>+4921-5000</cbc:Telephone>

<cbc:ElectronicMail>dbout.it</cbc:ElectronicMail>

</cac:Contact>

</cac:Party>

</cac:AccountingSupplierParty>

-<cac:Party>


-<cac:PostalAddress>

<cbc:StreetName>Ant-Str. 2</cbc:StreetName>

<cbc:CityName>Hannover</cbc:CityName>

<cbc:PostalZone>371</cbc:PostalZone>


+<cac:Country>

</cac:PostalAddress>

</cac:PostalAddress>


-<cac:PartyTaxScheme>

</cac:TaxScheme>

</cac:Delivery>

<cbc:ID>GDE3EXXX</cbc:ID>

</cac:FinancialInstitutionBranch>

</cac:PayeeFinancialAccount>

</cac:PaymentMeans>


-<cac:PaymentTerms>

<cbc:Note>#SKONTO#TENT=0.00# </cbc:Note>

</cac:PaymentTerms>


-<cac:TaxTotal>

<cbc:TaxAmount currencyID="EUR">76.00</cbc:TaxAmount>

<cbc:TaxableAmount currencyID="EUR">400.00</cbc:TaxableAmount>

</cac:LegalMonetaryTotal>

-<cac:Item>

<cbc:Description>MediaRange MROS211 - Maus - optisch - 3 Tasten - kabelgebunden - USB 2.0 - Schwarz</cbc:Description>

</ubl:Invoice>

entry.title: Re: Invoice by ship-to
entry.content: Look at blogs such as SAP Business One – Formatted Searches and How to Find Them

entry.title: Re: Import data from BW Bex query to SAC system
entry.content:
Hi @William_Yu,

Yes, I am using classic account model. I will change to new model and check the import job.

Just to clarify, If I add new field to existing BW query, shall it allow to include new field for existing import job or will it require to replace the datasource even the query is same.

Regards, Vasu

entry.title: A/R Reserve Invoice payment through Bank Statement Processing - HOW?
entry.content:
In SAP B1 an A/R Reserve Invoice has been issued, but we are unable to properly record the incoming customer payment through 'Bank Statement Processing.'
There is no 'Proposal for uncleared rows.' I tried adjusting the dates, but the specific A/R Reserve Invoice in question never appears. Any help would be greatly appreciated

entry.title: Re: MARC | MVKE tables not getting updated with MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK
entry.content: To check wether or not the two tables MARC and MVKE are updated or not you can run a SQL Trace via transaction ST05 and check if those tables are UPDATEd or not

entry.title: The interface could not be created in Step 6.
entry.content:
Create a Simple IDoc Interface | SAP Tutorials The interface could not be created in Step 6. 

The error message indicates unlicense.What does this mean, and how should I proceed? Kindly advise. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to Read Data Stored in SAP Datasphere from SAP BW Bridge
entry.content:
Thanks. That makes sense.

Will the writing to the aDSO then simply create a normal BW request that we subsequently can activate?

entry.title: Re: Available quantity for prod. XXXXXX is not sufficient...
entry.content: Stock was in assigned status to IBDs so after removing assignment from deliveries process has worked properly. SAP Note 02607884

entry.title: Re: Sales organization is not defined error in intercompany billing
entry.content: This comment saved me! Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Content Server maintenance date
entry.content: Is SAP NOTE 719917 - SAP Content Server Strategy applicable with RISE with SAP?

entry.title: Unable to find my deployed Processes and triggers in the manage section
entry.content:
Hi 
I am unable to find my deployed processes and triggers in the manage section of the SAP build lobby. I am currently referring to the Step 3 (Run Business process) of the mission in SAP Build apps. Kindly help me with the same. Attaching the screenshot here from the tutorial as well as my own screen.

This is my screen.

This is the tutorial screen.

Kindly help me with this issue. earlier response to this will be highly appreciated.
Thanks

entry.title: SSO on Web Client
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We have implemented SSO on SAP B1 2405. It works fine with B1 client, however it is not working properly on web client (tested via Chrome and Edge). Note that the login itself works in web client, but we need to enter login data manually. Is it possible to enable automatic authentication with windows user (the same way it works in B1 client)?

entry.title: Re: Unable to Retrieve Roles and Groups from IAS in UI5/C...
entry.content: @subhm779 You can use the /user-api/currentUser API to retrieve the logged-in user's email. Then, you can use the Identity Directory API's /Users endpoint to get the user's groups by specifying the user's email in the query.

entry.title: Automatic packaging using palletization 0PAL in inbound process
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Can we use 0PAL packaging process for automatic HU creation like 0IBD? secondly when I use 0PAL it is asking for destination HUs so how to generate those HUs ?

Please help.

entry.title: Re: A/R Reserve Invoice payment through Bank Statement Pr...
entry.content:
Hi,

I checked this in the DEMO FP2411 and works fine.

The things checked for setup are 'Internal operation Code' which is Business Partner from/to Bank Transfer' and the Matching Criteria for Documents as Rule 1 to be Posting Date with variation days as 10(as example).

The  'Proposal for uncleared rows' button displayed the AR Reserve Invoice created.

Check the setup and see if you can find something.

kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Generate ABAP Repository objects not display after in...
entry.content:
Hi @ddaniellecn, 

The "Generate ABAP Repository Objects" menu in ADT is available starting S/4HANA 2022. Please see the comment by Andre Fisher in the following blog post.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-btp-abap-environment-release-2111/ba-p/13500610#comment-607332

And the following option is a different one from the "Generate ABAP Repository Objects" menu. You trigger the generator by launching the preview from the service binding.

https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-abap-rap?tab=readme-ov-file

entry.title: Consulta transaccion CO88-KO88 liquidacion de ordenes de fabricacion
entry.content:
Hola, mi consulta es la siguiente, yo pensaba que estas transacciones solo trataban aquellas órdenes con estatus de entregado y cierre técnico pero he visto que también líquida órdenes con estatus entregado y liberado ( sin cierre técnico). Esto es correcto? no se puede customizar para que solo trate las órdenes con estatus de cierre técnico?.

Gias

entry.title: Re: F110 : RFFOAVIS_FPAYM ( Spool Generation for Adobe fo...
entry.content:
I am also facing the same issue... 

Can anyone tell me how to stop the spool deletion while sending the mail to vendor.
